     the Fermi energy is    -0.4352 ev

!    total energy              =  -11738.27727468 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000012 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08766195 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11738.18961274 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -237773.92395019 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  119985.87855961 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4202.95037381 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110255.81184619 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.00569454 Ry

     total magnetization       =    42.03 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    52.80 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  23 iterations
